Essomero lya Budda Islamic Junior
AmakaEbikwata ku ffeOkuyingizibwaWaayoTusisinkane

Okukula mu Biseera by'omu Maaso n'Ebifo by'Okusula

Ekiruubirirwa kyaffe ku kugaza Essomero lya Budda Islamic Junior okusobola okuweereza abayizi n'amaka amangi

Ebifo by'Okusula

Tuteekateeka okuleeta ebifo by'okusula okusobola okutwala abayizi okuva mu bitundu eby'ewala

Okusaba Okusula

Saba okusula kw'omwana wo

Enteekateeka z'Okukula mu Biseera by'omu Maaso

Enteekateeka z'Okukulaakulanya

Enteekateeka z'okugaza zirimu ebibiina ebipya, ekisenge ky'ebyobugezi, ekisenge kya kompyuta, n'ebifo by'emizannyo

Omutendera gw'Ebiseera

2025-2027: Okuzimba ekitundu ekisooka n'okukulaakulanya ebifo by'okusula

Emiganyulo gy'Okugaza

✓Okwongera obubaka bw'abayizi
✓Ebifo by'okuyiga ebisinga obulungi
✓Ebifo by'okusula
✓Pulogulaamu z'emizannyo ezirongooseddwa
✓Okugatta tekinologiya y'omulembe

Tuyambe Okugaza Kwaffe

Ebyawaayo byammwe bituyamba okuzimba ebifo ebisinga obulungi n'okuweereza abayizi abangi mu kitundu kyaffe

Waayo KaakanoManya Ebisingawo

Essomero lya Budda Islamic Junior

Okuwa ebyenjigiriza bya kisilamu ebisinga obulungi ebikuza obukugu mu masomo n'okukula mu mwoyo.

Enkuubo ez'Amangu

  • Ebikwata ku ffe
  • Okuyingizibwa
  • Waayo

Amakuru g'Okusisinkana

Budda, Disitulikiti ya Wakiso, Uganda
